overarchingInquiryQuestion: How does Kazuo Ishiguro's distinctively subtle narrative style in An Artist of the Floating World convey significant ideas about the interplay between personal identity and national history, and what does this reveal about the nature of memory, truth and moral responsibility?

auditPoints.text: develop detailed analytical and critical knowledge, understanding and appreciation of the text through close analysis of its construction, content and language
develop your own rich, informed personal interpretation, basing your judgements on detailed textual evidence
understand notions of textual integrity, the distinctive qualities of the text and its significance
evaluate the text's context with regard to its composition and reception
investigate and evaluate the perspectives of others in developing your own understanding
express a considered personal perspective on the text's value and meaning, using appropriate register, structure and modality
